---
title: Data Upload Example
format: 
  live-html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    css: ../styling/styles.css
    theme:
      light: cosmo
      dark: [darkly, ../styling/theme-dark.scss]
    respect-user-color-scheme: true

pyodide:
  packages:
    - pandas
    - openpyxl
---

## Python 

::: {.upload-panel}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof csv_file = Inputs.file({
  label: "Upload CSV file",
  accept: ".csv",
  required: false
})

csv_text = csv_file ? await csv_file.text() : null
csv_name = csv_file ? csv_file.name : null
```

:::

This uses an `ojs` file input rather than an `ipywidgets.FileUpload`. The intended workflow is: upload the file, run the next Python cell to create `df`, then run later cells manually.

```{pyodide}
#| echo: false
#| input:
#|   - csv_text
#|   - csv_name
import io
import pandas as pd

def _is_missing(value):
    return value is None or type(value).__name__ in {"JsNull", "JsUndefined"}


if _is_missing(csv_text):
    print("Upload a CSV file to create a DataFrame.")
else:
    df = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(csv_text))
    print(f"Uploaded: {csv_name}")
    print(f"Shape: {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns")
    display(df)
```

```{pyodide}
df.describe(include="all")
```

```{pyodide}
numeric_columns = df.select_dtypes(include="number").columns.tolist()
print("Numeric columns:", numeric_columns)

if numeric_columns:
    display(df[numeric_columns].mean().rename("mean"))
```

## Excel Upload

This is the same manual workflow, but for `.xlsx` files. The likely Excel engine here is `calamine`, not `openpyxl`.

::: {.upload-panel}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof xlsx_file = Inputs.file({
  label: "Upload Excel file",
  accept: ".xlsx",
  required: false
})

xlsx_name = xlsx_file ? xlsx_file.name : null
xlsx_bytes = xlsx_file
  ? Array.from(new Uint8Array(await xlsx_file.arrayBuffer()))
  : null
```

:::

```{pyodide}
#| echo: false
#| input:
#|   - xlsx_bytes
#|   - xlsx_name
import io
import pandas as pd

def _is_missing(value):
    return value is None or type(value).__name__ in {"JsNull", "JsUndefined"}


if _is_missing(xlsx_bytes):
    print("Upload an Excel file to create excel_df.")
else:
    excel_df = pd.read_excel(
        io.BytesIO(bytes(xlsx_bytes)),
    )
    print(f"Uploaded: {xlsx_name}")
    print(f"Shape: {excel_df.shape[0]} rows x {excel_df.shape[1]} columns")
    display(excel_df)
```

```{pyodide}
excel_df.describe(include="all")
```

```{pyodide}
excel_numeric_columns = excel_df.select_dtypes(include="number").columns.tolist()
print("Numeric columns:", excel_numeric_columns)

if excel_numeric_columns:
    display(excel_df[excel_numeric_columns].mean().rename("mean"))
```

```{pyodide}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
excel_df.plot(x='time', y='signal')

plt.show()
```
